CLIP cell identification

##LIBS

library(dplyr)
library(magrittr)
library(conos)
library(pagoda2)
library(scHelper)
library(cacoa)
set.seed(1)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrastr)
library(cowplot)
library(HDF5Array)
library(Seurat)
library(SeuratObject)
library(scHelper)
# Check if 'figure' folder exists, if not, create it
if (!dir.exists("figures")) {
  dir.create("figures")
  cat("Created 'figures' folder\n")
} else {
  cat("'figures' folder already exists\n")
}
Created 'figures' folder

##Load objects

con_n <- readRDS("../../5.neurons/con_neurons.rds")
cao_n <- readRDS("../../5.neurons/cao_neurons.rds")
seu <- readRDS("../../../TSC2024_data_files/5.neurons/seurat_neurons.rds")

Set annotation level and UMAP

# Level
head(seu@meta.data)
cell.types <- seu@meta.data$annol4 %>% levels
cell.types
 [1] "ID2_CHRNA7_CNR1"          "ID2_CHRNA7_NCKAP5"       
 [3] "ID2_CHRNA7_PAX6"          "ID2_LAMP5_CRH"           
 [5] "ID2_LAMP5_MEIS2"          "ID2_LAMP5_NMBR"          
 [7] "ID2_LAMP5_NOS1"           "L2_3_CUX2_FREM3_NTNG1"   
 [9] "L2_CUX2_LAMP5_PDGFD"      "L3_CUX2_SPOCK3_PRSS12"   
[11] "L4_RORB_SCHLAP1_ARHGAP15" "L4_RORB_SCHLAP1_MET"     
[13] "L4_RORB_SCHLAP1_MME"      "L5_6_FEZF2_LRRK1_PCP4"   
[15] "L5_6_FEZF2_LRRK1_SEMA3E"  "L5_6_FEZF2_TLE4_ABO"     
[17] "L5_6_FEZF2_TLE4_HTR2C"    "L5_6_FEZF2_TLE4_SCUBE1"  
[19] "L5_6_THEMIS_NR4A2_NTNG2"  "L5_6_THEMIS_SEMA3A"      
[21] "PVALB_BTBD11"             "SST_CALB1"               
[23] "PVALB_LGR5"               "PVALB_MEPE"              
[25] "SST_ISOC_THSD7B"          "PVALB_UNC5B"             
[27] "SST_NOS1"                 "SST_NPY"                 
[29] "SST_STK32A"               "SST_TAC3"                
[31] "SST_TH"                   "TBD"                     
[33] "Neu_dev_THY1"             "VIP_ABI3BP"              
[35] "VIP_CBLN1"                "VIP_CRH"                 
[37] "VIP_NRG1"                 "VIP_SEMA3C"              
[39] "VIP_TRPM3_SSTR1"          "VIP_TYR"                 
Idents(seu) <- "annol4"

# UMAP
umap_conos <- con_n$embeddings$UMAP %>% as.data.frame()
colnames(umap_conos) <- c("UMAP_1","UMAP_2")
umap_conos <- umap_conos[Cells(seu), , drop = FALSE]
umap_conos <- CreateDimReducObject(embeddings = as.matrix(umap_conos), key="UMAPCON_", assay = DefaultAssay((seu)))
seu[["umap_conos"]] <- umap_conos

##Cell type plot order

sorted_types <- c(
  "L2_3_CUX2_FREM3_NTNG1",
  "L2_CUX2_LAMP5_PDGFD",
  "L3_CUX2_SPOCK3_PRSS12",
  "L4_RORB_SCHLAP1_ARHGAP15",
  "L4_RORB_SCHLAP1_MET",
  "L4_RORB_SCHLAP1_MME",
  "L5_6_FEZF2_LRRK1_PCP4",
  "L5_6_FEZF2_LRRK1_SEMA3E",
  "L5_6_FEZF2_TLE4_ABO",
  "L5_6_FEZF2_TLE4_HTR2C",
  "L5_6_FEZF2_TLE4_SCUBE1",
  "L5_6_THEMIS_NR4A2_NTNG2",
  "L5_6_THEMIS_SEMA3A",
  "Neu_dev_THY1",
  "TBD",
  "ID2_CHRNA7_CNR1",
  "ID2_CHRNA7_NCKAP5",
  "ID2_CHRNA7_PAX6",
  "ID2_LAMP5_CRH",
  "ID2_LAMP5_MEIS2",
  "ID2_LAMP5_NMBR",
  "ID2_LAMP5_NOS1",
  "VIP_ABI3BP",
  "VIP_CBLN1",
  "VIP_CRH",
  "VIP_NRG1",
  "VIP_SEMA3C",
  "VIP_TRPM3_SSTR1",
  "VIP_TYR",
  "PVALB_BTBD11",
  "PVALB_LGR5",
  "PVALB_MEPE",
  "PVALB_UNC5B",
  "SST_CALB1",
  "SST_ISOC_THSD7B",
  "SST_NOS1",
  "SST_NPY",
  "SST_STK32A",
  "SST_TAC3",
  "SST_TH"
)

# Apply factor level order
seu@active.ident <- factor(Idents(seu), levels = sorted_types)

Extended data fig. 9a

# Updated CLIP markers based on Eichmüller et al. (2022)
# CLIP markers expressed in cortical tubers
clip_markers <- c("EDNRB", "PTGDS", "EGFR", "PROX1", "NR2F2", "SP8", "SCGN")

# Exclusion markers (non-CLIP or late-appearing lineages)
exclude_markers <- c("PAX6", "EOMES", "OLIG2", "NKX2-1", "GFAP", "PVALB", "SATB2")

plot_markers <- c( "SST","PVALB","NKX2-1","LHX6","EDNRB", "PTGDS", "EGFR", "PROX1", "NR2F2", "SP8", "SCGN","GAD1", "EOMES", "OLIG2",  "GFAP", "SATB2","RBFOX3")

#DotPlot(seu, features = clip_markers, cols = c("blue", "red"), dot.scale = 8) + RotatedAxis()
#DotPlot(seu, features = exclude_markers, cols = c("blue", "red"), dot.scale = 8) +   RotatedAxis()
DotPlot(seu, features = plot_markers,  dot.scale = 8) +
  scale_color_distiller(palette = "PuOr",limits = c(-2, 2), oob = scales::squish) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, hjust = 1)) +
  coord_flip()+
  xlab(NULL) +
  ylab(NULL)
Scale for colour is already present.
Adding another scale for colour, which will replace the existing scale.

filename = "figures/CLIP_dotplot_marker_expression.pdf"
pdf.width = 11.5
pdf.height = 6.5
dev.copy2pdf(file=filename, width = pdf.width, height = pdf.height)
png 
  2

Estimate scores

seu <- AddModuleScore(seu, features = list(clip_markers), name = "CLIP_Score", )
seu <- AddModuleScore(seu, features = list(exclude_markers), name = "Exclude_Score")

Plot scores

Extended data fig. 9b,c,d

library(patchwork)
# Create individual FeaturePlots
p1 <- DimPlot(seu, reduction = "umap_conos",group.by = "annol4",pt.size = 0.05,alpha = 0.3,shuffle = T,repel = T, label = F, label.size = 2.5) +
  NoLegend() +
  ggtitle("Annotation") +  
  theme(
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.line = element_blank()
  )
p1 <- LabelClusters(
  plot = p1,
  id = "annol4",
  repel = TRUE,
  size = 2.5,
  fontface = "bold"
  )
p1 <- p1 %>% rasterize(dpi=600)
p2 <- FeaturePlot(seu, features = "CLIP_Score1", reduction = "umap_conos",pt.size = 0.05,alpha = 0.3) +
  scale_color_distiller(palette = "YlOrBr", oob = scales::squish, direction = 1) +
    ggtitle("CLIP score") +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.line = element_blank()
  )
Scale for colour is already present.
Adding another scale for colour, which will replace the existing scale.
p2 <- p2 %>% rasterize(dpi=600)
p3 <- FeaturePlot(seu, features = "Exclude_Score1", reduction = "umap_conos",pt.size = 0.05,alpha = 0.3) +
  scale_color_distiller(palette = "YlOrBr", oob = scales::squish, direction = 1) +  
  ggtitle("Exclude score") +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.line = element_blank()
  ) 
Scale for colour is already present.
Adding another scale for colour, which will replace the existing scale.
p3 <- p3 %>% rasterize(dpi=600)
plot_grid(p1, p2, p3, ncol = 3, rel_widths = c(5, 5.7, 5.7))

filename = "figures/CLIP_UMAP_scores.pdf"
pdf.width = 16.4
pdf.height = 5.5
dev.copy2pdf(file=filename, width = pdf.width, height = pdf.height)
png 
  2

##Plot score on UMAP # Extended data fig. 9e

clip_cells <- WhichCells(seu, expression = CLIP_Score1 > 0.5 & Exclude_Score1 < 0.2)
seu$CLIP_candidate <- ifelse(colnames(seu) %in% clip_cells, "CLIP", "Other")

p4 <- DimPlot(seu, group.by = "CLIP_candidate", reduction = "umap_conos",pt.size = 0.05, alpha=0.3,cols = c("CLIP" = "#8E44AD","Other" = "#BDC3C7"))+
    ggtitle("CLIP cell candidates") +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.line = element_blank()
  )
p4 <- p4 %>% rasterize(dpi=600)
p4

filename = "figures/CLIP_UMAP_candidates.pdf"
pdf.width = 5.7
pdf.height = 5.5
dev.copy2pdf(file=filename, width = pdf.width, height = pdf.height)
png 
  2

Frequency of CLIP cells

clip_table <- table(seu$CLIP_candidate, seu$condition) %>% print()
       
        Control  TSC2
  CLIP      858   874
  Other   25771 46900
prop.table(table(seu$CLIP_candidate, seu$condition), margin = 2)
       
           Control       TSC2
  CLIP  0.03222051 0.01829447
  Other 0.96777949 0.98170553

Boxplot control vs TSC

Extended data fig. 9f

library(ggpubr)
# Extract metadata
meta <- seu@meta.data

# Count cells per group and sample
counts <- meta %>%
  group_by(sample = sample, group = CLIP_candidate, condition = condition) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = group, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) %>%
  mutate(total = CLIP + Other,
         prop_clip = CLIP / total)


ggplot(counts, aes(x = condition, y = prop_clip, fill=condition)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.3,) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, size = 2, color = "black", alpha = 0.8) +
  stat_compare_means(method = "wilcox.test", label.y = 0.07, label.x = 1.5, size = 5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Control" = "dodgerblue3", "TSC2" = "deeppink3"))+
  labs(x = "Condition", y = "CLIP cell proportion") +
  theme_classic()+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0),)


wilcox.test(prop_clip ~ condition, data = counts)

    Wilcoxon rank sum exact test

data:  prop_clip by condition
W = 52, p-value = 0.06157
alternative hypothesis: true location shift is not equal to 0
filename = "figures/CLIP_boxplot_control_vs_TSC.pdf"
pdf.width = 6
pdf.height = 6
dev.copy2pdf(file=filename, width = pdf.width, height = pdf.height)
png
